title: trollius yunnanensis
intro: Trollius yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan Globe Flower, is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in China. Its flowers, leaves, and roots are used in traditional Chinese medicine, where they are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The medicinal properties of Trollius yunnanensis are thought to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Trollius yunnanensis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be used in herbal teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
